    Bhaskar Bhaumik

    AI Innovation Leader at TCS. Builder of AI Rapid Build Camps. Enterprise Data & Analytics Architect.

    • Atlanta, Georgia, USA
    • LinkedIn
    • GitHub
    • Hugging Face

    Experience

    25+ years of progressive leadership in data, analytics, and AI — from systems engineer to AI Innovation Director.

    Apr 2025 – Present

    Director, AI Solutions & Rapid Build Camps

    Tata Consultancy Services — AI & Services Transformation, Americas

    Leading billable AI Innovation Camps and Rapid Build practices across the Americas. Building composable accelerators, delivery playbooks, and reusable codebases targeting 50%+ velocity improvement in AI MVP delivery.

    2022 – 2025

    Head, AI Innovation Americas / Head, AI & Data (Retail Americas)

    Tata Consultancy Services

    P&L ownership ~$25M; grew portfolio 50%+ in 3 years. Led 200+ member team transformation to AI-first model. Drove Agentic AI and GenAI pursuits across healthcare, engineering, and technology sectors.

    2019 – 2022

    Consulting Director, Data & Analytics

    Tata Consultancy Services · Atlanta, Georgia, USA

    D&A strategy consulting at CXO/ELT level. Led transformations at Macy's, Advance Auto Parts, and Genuine Parts Company. GCP AI/ML platform delivery. Non-CIO D&A initiatives at The Home Depot and HD Supply.

    2015 – 2019

    Consulting Director, Data & Analytics

    Tata Consultancy Services · Atlanta, Georgia, USA

    Enterprise-scale D&A solutions architecture, cloud migration, and self-serve BI platform design. Architected modern data lakehouse and advanced analytics platforms.

    2005 – 2015

    Technical Architect & Program Manager

    Tata Consultancy Services · Atlanta, Georgia, USA

    Architected enterprise EDW, data integration, and BI systems. Established the D&A COE and services delivery team at The Home Depot.

    1999 – 2005

    Systems Engineer → Technical Lead

    Tata Consultancy Services · Cardiff, Wales, UK & Chennai, India

    Developer, designer, and tester on enterprise data warehouse and billing systems for British Telecommunications plc.

    Industries Served

    🛒 Retail
    📡 Telecom
    🏥 Healthcare & Life Sciences
    ✈️ Travel & Hospitality
    🏭 CPG & Manufacturing
    ⚙️ Engineering & EPC
